response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar
ENTITY Order
PK order_id
ATTR order_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_id : integer : FK
ATTR order_date : date
REL Order -> Client : 0..N -> 1 : FK=client_id
ENTITY Material
PK material_id
ATTR material_id : integer : PK
ATTR material_name : varchar
ENTITY Operation
PK operation_id
ATTR operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR operation_name : varchar
ENTITY OrderLine
PK order_line_id
ATTR order_line_id : integer : PK
ATTR order_id : integer : FK
ATTR material_id : integer : FK
ATTR operation_id : integer : FK
ATTR quantity : integer
ATTR scheduled_datetime : datetime
ATTR price : decimal
REL OrderLine -> Order : 0..N -> 1 : FK=order_id
REL OrderLine -> Material : 0..N -> 1 : FK=material_id
REL OrderLine -> Operation : 0..N -> 1 : FK=operation_id
